overall.description: First-person horseback riding through open grasslands at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The rider transitions from tall grass to a dirt path while moving through the dark landscape under a starry sky with scattered clouds.

agents.ego_description: riding horse through tall grass field, holding a lit torch in the left hand

entered.detail: flickering flame from handheld torch illuminating the immediate area with warm orange light
dense tall grass covering the ground, swaying as the horse moves through it
dark night sky with scattered clouds and visible stars/moon providing ambient light
dark silhouette of trees on the distant horizon line

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view from horseback moving through dense tall grass at night. A handheld torch on the left provides the primary light source, casting warm illumination on the grass while the dark sky with scattered clouds is visible above. The horse moves steadily forward through the open prairie with no other entities in sight.

events.description: horse transitions from tall grass onto a compacted dirt path

agents.ego_description: riding horse along dirt trail through open landscape, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: narrow dirt path cutting through the grassland, with visible wheel ruts and compacted earth
tall grass growing on the left side of the dirt trail
tall grass growing on the right side of the dirt trail

elements.scene_description: The horse moves from the open grass field onto a defined dirt trail that cuts through the landscape. The torch continues to illuminate the path ahead while grass banks flank both sides of the trail. The terrain becomes more defined as a track or pathway, and the rider continues through the dark open country under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from horseback moving through a dark, open prairie under a cloudy night sky. It begins with the camera gliding through dense tall grass, where a handheld torch on the left casts a warm, flickering glow across the vegetation. As the horse moves steadily forward, the light cuts through the surrounding darkness to reveal the vastness of the open landscape. The scene maintains this steady pace, with the torch illuminating the immediate path while the scattered clouds drift slowly above in the deep night sky.
